opportunities.entry_trigger: Scale into longs $65,500-$68,200 on intraday dips; require daily close above $65,000 to hold.
opportunities.rationale: Crypto Fear & Greed at 10 (Extreme Fear) is historically a contrarian buy for BTC -- previous readings below 15 preceded 20-40% rallies within 30 days. Price testing $65K-$68K demand zone that held in prior corrections. Spot ETF institutional flows remain the structural bid. Invalidated below $61,000 which opens path to $55K.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter $1,960-$2,060 only if BTC holds above $65,000; invalidated on 4H close below $1,900.
opportunities.rationale: BlackRock staked Ethereum ETF (launched Mar 14 on Nasdaq) provides institutional accumulation catalyst. ETH down 12% in 7 days to $2,067, approaching $1,950-$2,000 structural support. LOW conviction: ETH underperforming BTC in risk-off, altcoins capped in high-vol regime. Invalidated below $1,780 crash low.

opportunities.entry_trigger: Enter $83-$87 only if BTC holds above $65,000 and SOL shows daily RSI divergence; exit immediately if BTC loses $65K.
opportunities.rationale: CME SOL futures and options provide growing institutional access. SOL down 9.7% in 7 days to $86.93, testing $83-$88 support from prior consolidation. HIGH beta play sized at 1% only. LOW conviction: altcoins are dangerous in Extreme Fear with high-vol regime. Invalidated below $74 which is the Jan 2026 swing low.
